PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Boston in Propria Persona.

Ms. Boston provided a corrected order. The Court informed Ms. Boston that probate is not a simple process, that it is governed by statutes and rules that are very technical, spoke of the possibility of liability on behalf of the Administrator and suggested obtaining an Attorney. Ms. Boston stated that she has two close friends (an Attorney and a Probate Judge in Texas), that once she is named she will account for everything, make a list of everything, pay all of the debts and have an appraiser come in if the Court wants her to. The Court informed Ms. Boston that an Appraiser is required, that she needs to give notice to the Sister who is not named in the will, that there are time limits, and that she can not use or spend Estate assets. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to February 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to accomplish notice and for Ms. Boston to make sure everyone entitled to notice receives it timely.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
